title: ZaifaPlayz Modpack
description: A high-performance FPS boost modpack built with Sodium, Sodium Extra, and additional optimization mods, designed to deliver smoother gameplay while including Replay and Zoom mods.
body: ZaifaPlayz Modpack is a high-performance Minecraft modpack designed to maximize your FPS and optimize game performance. Featuring Sodium, Lithium, FPS Booster mods, Replay Mod, Zoomify, and other performance-enhancing utilities, this pack ensures smooth gameplay even on lower-end systems. Whether you want to record your adventures, zoom into details, or enjoy Minecraft with higher frame rates, ZaifaPlayz Modpack delivers a seamless and enhanced experience. Perfect for players who value speed, stability, and visual clarity.
